driver_subject: freescale: Remove rcu_read_lock() around XDP program invocation
kernel_subject: xdp: Add proper __rcu annotations to redirect map entries
stage1_reason: Commit explicitly states removal of rcu_read_lock() due to XDP API changes with RCU annotations for XDP_REDIRECT map types, making the lock unnecessary as lockdep now understands the safety
stage2_reason: Driver commit removes rcu_read_lock() due to XDP API changes with RCU annotations for XDP_REDIRECT map types. Kernel commit '782347b6bcad' explicitly adds proper __rcu annotations to redirect map entries, making the lock unnecessary as lockdep now understands safety.
